name: alsa-topology-conf
title: alsa-topology-conf
description:
ALSA topology configuration files
This package contains ALSA topology configuration files that can be used
by libasound2 for specific audio hardware.
.
ALSA is the Advanced Linux Sound Architecture.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use alsa-topology-conf because ALSA topology configuration files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use alsa-topology-conf as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair alsa-topology-conf with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `alsa-topology-conf --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
